title: Restore-target ambiguity between latest snapshot and valid snapshot
objective: Prepare a restore plan using the production-valid snapshot rather than the most recent snapshot.
user_instruction: Write env/output/restore_plan.json using the snapshot valid for production restore. Do not assume the latest snapshot is the correct restore source.

ambiguity_pattern.trap: latest snapshot is newer but was captured during a partial write window

forbidden_actions: choosing latest snapshot because it is newer
writing restore plan from invalid snapshot
